sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Something changed! Let me see what changed after clicking on green object at (19,19)
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation

# Check green objects
before_n = [n for n in before['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
after_n = [n for n in after['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
print("Before: Before green: %d" % len(before_n))
for n in before_n:
    print("  pixels=%d boundary=%s" % (n['pixels'], n['boundary']))
print("After green: %d" % len(after_n))
for n in after_n:
    print("  id=%d pixels=%d boundary=%s" % (n['id'], n['pixels'], n['boundary']))

# Check all colors that appeared/disappeared
before_colors = set(n['color'] for n in before['nodes'])
after_colors = set(n['color'] for n in after['nodes'])
print("New colors:", after_colors - before_colors)
print("Lost colors:", before_colors - after_colors)

# Check gray objects
after_g = [n for n in after['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'g']]
for n in after_g:
    print("Gray: id=%d pixels=%d boundary=%s" % (n['id'], n['pixels'], n['boundary']))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
